zh.Abbots Bromley, Staffordshire, England,: 英國英格蘭斯塔福爾阿波茲 布羅姆利
zh.lifeSummary: Guillaume de Mauvoisin於1200年出生在英國斯塔福爾。他於1229年與Matilda Rydeware在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾阿波茲 布羅姆利結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1271年6月在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾享年71歲。

zh-hans.Abbots Bromley, Staffordshire, England,: 英国英格兰斯塔福爾阿波茲 布羅姆利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Guillaume de Mauvoisin于1200年出生在英国斯塔福爾。他于1229年与Matilda Rydeware在英国英格兰斯塔福爾阿波茲 布羅姆利结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1271年6月在英国英格兰斯塔福爾享年71岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Guillaume
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: William
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: Guillaume de Mauvoisin was born in 1200, in Staffordshire, England. He married Matilda Rydeware in 1229, in Abbots Bromley, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in June 1271, in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Guillaume de Mauvoisin est né en 1200, à Staffordshire, Angleterre. Il a épousé Matilda Rydeware en 1229, à Abbots Bromley, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en juin 1271, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 71 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Guillaume de Mauvoisinは1200年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアで生まれた。1229年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアアボツ ブロムリーでMatilda Rydewareと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1271年6月にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアで71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Guillaume de Mauvoisin(은)는 1200년 영국 스태퍼드실르에서 태어났다. 그는 1229년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 애벗스 브롬리에서 Matilda Rydeware(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1271년 6월 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Guillaume de Mauvoisin родился в 1200 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия. Он женился на женщине по имени Matilda Rydeware в 1229 г. в местности эббоц бромли, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер июнь 1271 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 71 год.
